spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Asymmetrical & Artistic) for Marketing/Home sections, strict dense grids for Shop/Cart pages
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: Wide (gap-8 to gap-12) for home page layouts, Tight (gap-4) for product grids
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px) to maintain a sharp, high-end editorial feel

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 border-b border-[#E5DCD3]/50) for fixed navs
surface_strategies.cards: Flat Background with 1px delicate border (border-[#E5DCD3]). On hover: subtle float (-translate-y-1) and shadow-xl shadow-[#6B1724]/5
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: Solid Maroon (#6B1724) with white text, no border radius. Hover: bg-[#800000]. Secondary: Transparent with 1px border (#6B1724) and maroon text.

component_instructions.navigation: Sticky nav with logo centered, links flanking. Transparent glass effect. Must include Wishlist, Cart, Profile, Search icons.
component_instructions.hero_section: Full viewport height or max 80vh. Use a high-quality fashion image with a subtle left-aligned text overlay (gradient overlay from-black/40 via-transparent to-transparent).
component_instructions.product_cards: Aspect ratio 3:4 or 4:5 for images. Minimal text below: Title (body font), Price (bold), subtle 'Add to Cart' appearing on hover. No heavy borders.
component_instructions.cart_checkout: Clean, distraction-free layout. 2-column on desktop. Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, selects, but style them with square corners and beige/maroon focus rings.
component_instructions.admin_dashboard: Use tight grids. Neutral backgrounds. Clear typographic hierarchy. Keep charts minimal with Recharts.

hero_banners.description: Woman in golden dress - Perfect for Hero Banner
Woman in elegant green ruffled sari with gold trim - Great for alternate hero or collection banner

collections.description: Floral print tunic and pants - Kurtis Collection
Pink outfit with cape - Festive Collection
Smiling woman in patterned jumpsuit - Co-ord Sets

textures_and_backgrounds.description: Red and yellow floral pattern - Use for subtle banner backgrounds or mega menu backdrops

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale up (scale-105) inside a hidden-overflow container on hover. Buttons show a smooth background color transition.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade up elements staggered by 100ms. Use framer-motion for smooth entrance.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling (momentum scrolling). Let parallax slightly offset hero text vs background image.

icons.library: lucide-react for UI icons (clean, stroke-based), minimal usage. Rely more on typography and imagery.
icons.weight: Thin or Light stroke to match the premium editorial feel (stroke-width: 1.5 or 1).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., 'add-to-cart-button', 'main-nav-link-shop'.
